home.headline: One company per week: what it does well, what I'd do differently, and a growth loop to scale.
home.subtitle: By Diego Guzmán · I analyze growing businesses and write what I find.
home.description: I research how they make money, how they stand out from the competition, and what levers they have to grow.

newsletter.title: How I'd grow...
newsletter.subtitle: Each edition analyzes a company in depth and proposes a growth plan based on public data. What's working, where the opportunities are, and where to start.

about.title: Diego Guzmán
about.tagline: I build and analyze growing businesses.
about.bio1: I grew up in Costa Rica surrounded by businesses where they know you by name. Small shops, shoe stores and restaurants where you can see the effort in everything they do. Before studying marketing, I knew I wanted to help people create value. I moved to Madrid to pursue a master's that would help me connect traditional businesses with customers who don't know them yet.
about.bio2: In Madrid I discovered growth marketing. Growth is finding the smartest way to grow a business with what it already has. It's where marketing, data and business decisions meet. It's what I look for in every project.
about.bio3: Today I lead marketing at Mentorhood. Through Good People, a boutique B2B agency in Madrid, I help companies that want to grow. Every week I pick a company and analyze it: what they communicate, what their customers say, what they promise and what they deliver. I find where the opportunities are and design a system to grow with what they already have.
about.bio4: If you have a business with something good to offer and want to grow it, we do it here

footer.tagline: Marketing you can apply to your business.
